name: skill-vue2-to-vue3
description: 一个 Agent Skill，让 AI 助手成为 Vue 2 → Vue 3 迁移专家。包含专家知识库、SOP 工作流和可执行 Codemod。
author: vue2to3 contributors

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.test: node --import tsx/esm --test tests/codemod/filters.test.ts tests/codemod/router.test.ts tests/codemod/global-api.test.ts tests/codemod/lifecycle.test.ts tests/codemod/listeners.test.ts tests/codemod/sync-modifier.test.ts tests/codemod/template-key.test.ts tests/scan.test.ts tests/check.test.ts tests/integration/migration-flow.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node --import tsx/esm --test --watch tests/codemod/filters.test.ts tests/codemod/router.test.ts tests/codemod/global-api.test.ts tests/codemod/lifecycle.test.ts tests/codemod/listeners.test.ts tests/codemod/sync-modifier.test.ts tests/codemod/template-key.test.ts tests/scan.test.ts tests/check.test.ts
scripts.test:codemod: node --import tsx/esm --test tests/codemod/filters.test.ts tests/codemod/router.test.ts tests/codemod/global-api.test.ts tests/codemod/lifecycle.test.ts tests/codemod/listeners.test.ts tests/codemod/sync-modifier.test.ts tests/codemod/template-key.test.ts
scripts.format: prettier --write scripts tests bin tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json package.json .prettierrc.json
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run test
